text:
Created attachment 240700
appjail-2.3.1.patch

Description:

* Update to 2.3.1
* Add DOCS/PORTDOCS
* Make GIT option not to a default option
* Make short pkg-message

ChangeLog: https://github.com/DtxdF/AppJail/releases/tag/v2.3.1

* MAKEFILE: Remove unnecessary creation of the data directory.
* appjail version: Bump version to 2.3.1

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1-RELEASE, amd64, DEBOOTSTRAP DOCS GIT tested)
